title: coelogyne microscopica
intro: Coelogyne microscopica, also known as the miniature orchid or the tiny coelogyne, is a rare and small species of orchid native to the tropical forests of Southeast Asia. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, making it a popular ingredient in traditional herbal remedies. The health benefits of Coelogyne microscopica include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and even support immune function. In traditional herbal preparations, the plant is often dried, crushed, and then made into teas, infusions, or poultices to harness its medicinal properties.
